item.title: New football helmets excel in concussion tests, though engineering results show the back of the head is still vulnerable

item.title: Improving your biological age gap is associated with better brain health

item.title: A safer, more effective atrial fibrillation treatment method using magnetic gel may be on the way

item.title: No decline in childhood cancer survival in Sweden during the pandemic
